user.title: Connect to hzureal Cloud
user.description: Enter your hzureal cloud credentials (Phone, Password, and App Key).

select_gateway.title: Select Gateway
select_gateway.description: Choose which gateway (SN) you want to integrate.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate hzureal
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please enter your Password and App Key again.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the server. Check the API URL.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid phone, password, or App Key.
error.no_gateways: No gateways found for this account.
